# Benchmark Reports

This directory contains auto-generated performance benchmark reports from test runs.

## Auto-Generated Files

All `.json`, `.csv`, and other data files in this directory are automatically generated by:
- `pytest tests/performance --benchmark-only` (local runs)
- `.github/workflows/tests.yml` benchmarks job (CI runs)

**These files should NOT be committed to version control.**

## File Types

- `benchmark-summary-*.json` - Aggregated benchmark results with regression analysis
- `benchmark-*.json` - Detailed pytest-benchmark output
- `*.csv` - Export formats for analysis tools

## Viewing Reports

To view the latest benchmark results:

```bash
# Run benchmarks locally
make perf

# View latest summary
cat reports/benchmarks/benchmark-summary-*.json | jq .
```

## CI Benchmarks

Heavy benchmark jobs run on:
- Push to `main` branch
- Nightly schedule (2 AM UTC)
- Manual trigger via workflow_dispatch

Results are uploaded as GitHub Actions artifacts with 30-day retention.

## Configuration

Benchmark thresholds and baselines are configured in:
- `pytest.ini` - pytest-benchmark settings
- `.github/workflows/tests.yml` - CI benchmark job configuration
